person.name: Leucha FitzNigel
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
1130 Birth
Leucha's two known sons were probably born around 1155 and 1165. So because women rarely had children at 40 or more she was probably much younger than her husband, and likely born after 1130.

«b»Parents«/b»
Cockayne's Complete Peerage states that "It has been conjectured that she was a daughter of William FitzNeel of Halton, because Neston and other FitzNeel manors are found to have passed to the Mohaut family. Robert dapifer was first witness to a charter by William II FitzNeel, Constable of Chester, 1130-50. 

More popular recent works often simply accept that Leucha was the daughter of William fitz Nigel, 2nd Baron Halton, who was a prominent 12th-century noble, and son of Nigel, the 1st Baron Halton. But it should be considered unproven.

«b»Marriage«/b»
Leucha is named as the wife of Robert in the Inquisition 4 Edward I, respecting the dowry of the successive Ladies of Hawarden, ald also in Ralph de Montalt's grant of Neston to Chester Abbey for the souls of Robert his father and Leucha his mother.

«b»Residence: 
Mold Castle«/b»
A likely residence was Mold Castle, which Robert built in Flintshire, Wales probably around 1140. It is a good example of a Norman motte-and-bailey castle.

«b»1177 Death«/b»
Leuca was still living when her sons made a charter in favour of Chester Abbey dated between 1177 and 1182.

«b»Issue«/b»
Complete Peerage says "By his wife Leucha he had sons Ralph, Robert, William, Ranulph and Roger of Elford" citing Bracton's Note Book, no. 260.

1.) Ralph, son and heir Robert de Montalt, brother and successor of Ralph

2.) William, Rector of Neston.

3.) Ranulph, witnss with Roger de Montalt his brother, to his borther Ralph's grant of two bovates in Eggerley to his freedman Hernyne. 

4.) Roger of Elford or Roger de Montalt, brother and successor of Robert

5.) Robert de Mohaut, born ca 1162 in Hawarden, Cheshire, Wales. Robert de Montalt, brother and heir, confirmed "his brother" Ralph's donation of Neston in the time of Philip de Orresby, 1209-1228; during which Justiciaryship also his brother Roger succeeded. He may be considered to have died unmarried, as no wife of his is named in the Inquisition 4 Edward I, taken to prove settlement of dower or otherwise, by the successive Lords of Hawarden. 

He confirms his brother's donation to Chester abbey in the time of Philip de Orreby. Brother of Ralph de Montalt, seneschal of Chester, gives the said church to Chester Abbey; married Matilda, died s. p. temp. Ric. I; and William de Montalt, rector of Neston, noticed in his brother's grant to Chester Abbey. Robert de Mohaut died ca 1232.

Robert de Montalt, son of Robert, sensechal of Chester, confirms his brother's donation to Chester abbey in the time of Philip de Orreby. Brother of Ralph de Montalt, seneschal of Chester, gives the said church to Chester Abbey; married Matilda, died s. p. temp. Ric. I; and William de Montalt, rector of Neston, noticed in his brother's grant to Chester Abbey.

Gibbons adds sons John and Matthew.

zh.lifeSummary: Leucha FitzNigel是William Fitz Nigel的女兒，於1130年之後出生在英國英格蘭爾哈爾頓。她於1139年與Robert de Monte Alto結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1177年之後。

en.lifeSummary: Leucha FitzNigel was born after 1130, in Halton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Fitz Nigel. She married Robert de Monte Alto in 1139. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1177.

de.lifeSummary: Leucha FitzNigel wurde nach 1130 in Halton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William Fitz Nigel geboren. Sie hat 1139 Robert de Monte Alto geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1177.

ko.lifeSummary: Leucha FitzNigel(은)는 1130년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 할턴에서 William Fitz Nigel의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1139년 Robert de Monte Alto(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1177년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Leucha FitzNigel родилась после 1130 г. в местности хэлтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали William Fitz Nigel. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Monte Alto в 1139 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1177 г.
